properties.pets_restrictions: No animals raised, bred, or kept except a reasonable number of dogs, cats, or household pets. 'Reasonable number' subject to Board interpretation and nuisance standards. Pets must be kept in enclosed yard, enclosure, or on leash. Owner liable for damage or unreasonable noise caused by their animals or those of tenants/guests. Waste must be cleaned up immediately. (Section 10.6)
properties.rentals_restrictions: No explicit short-term rental restriction found in this document. This is a First Amendment to the original 1998 declaration, amending only Article 3 (voting by delegates). Full rental policy would be in the Original Declaration (recorded 1998-03-27, San Diego County File/Page 1998-0170035).
properties.parking_restrictions: No recreational off-road motor vehicles within Master Association Property (Section 6.5). Garages must be used for vehicular parking of owner-occupied cars — conversion to other uses prohibited. No vehicle repair or storage visible from other properties.
properties.architectural_control: Architectural review referenced. Full provisions in Original Declaration (1998). Amendment does not modify these articles.
properties.amendment_threshold: 66-2/3% of total Voting Power of Master Association AND at least 66-2/3% of Class A (non-Declarant) voting power required for amendments (Article 12, Section 12.3(b)). Guest Builder consent required for certain changes.
properties.board_size: Three classes of voting membership (Class A: Owners; Class B: Declarant and Guest Builders — 3x votes; Class C: Declarant-appointed directors). Class C membership and director appointment rights terminate upon Declarant's election.
properties.document_type: First Amendment to Declaration of Restrictions

properties.pets_restrictions: Maximum of 4 household pets per unit at any one time; maximum of 2 of any one species. (Page 35)
properties.rentals_restrictions: No explicit rental restriction found in extractable text. Board Rules and Regulations may impose additional limits.
properties.parking_restrictions: Commercial Vehicles (those with business advertising) and Recreational Vehicles (motorhomes, trailers, boats, campers) subject to restrictions. Specific details partially obscured by PDF text layer artifact — same restriction pattern as West Highlands Pacific HOA (sister Pardee Homes development).
properties.architectural_control: Architectural committee approval required before constructing or modifying any building, fence, wall, hedge, or improvement. Plans and specifications must be submitted showing location, design, and all items required under CC&Rs. Approval based on harmony of external design, location, and materials.
properties.amendment_threshold: 75% of members (standard amendments require written consent of 75% of voting power)
properties.extraction_method: llm (pdfplumber+dedup) — manual review from clean text

properties.ccr_url: HOA_govern_doc_samples/CC&R/NEWPHR Maintenance Association - CC&Rs with Articles and Bylaws.pdf
properties.pets_restrictions: Not found in pages reviewed via OCR. Document is 111 pages; pet policy likely in Use Restrictions article not yet sampled.
properties.rentals_restrictions: Declaration explicitly does not limit Declarant's right to market, sell, lease, or dispose of parcels. Owner rental rights not explicitly restricted in pages reviewed.
properties.parking_restrictions: Not found in pages reviewed via OCR.
properties.architectural_control: Architectural committee referenced. Specific review process not captured in pages reviewed via OCR.
properties.amendment_threshold: 67% of Voting Power of the Maintenance Association (Article 14, Section 14.1). Certain articles (e.g. Article 4) require Declarant's prior written consent to amend.
properties.board_size: 5 directors representing different Areas. Upon expiration of Class C (Declarant) membership, representatives shift to Class A/B members.

documents.pdf_path: HOA_govern_doc_samples/CC&R/NEWPHR Maintenance Association - CC&Rs with Articles and Bylaws.pdf

properties.pets_restrictions: Only commonly recognized household pets permitted; no animals, birds, or fowl of other types. Maximum of 4 household pets per unit at any one time.
properties.rentals_restrictions: Document does not contain explicit rental/leasing restrictions. Board Rules and Regulations may impose additional limits.
properties.parking_restrictions: No Commercial Vehicles (those displaying business advertising) or Recreational Vehicles (motorhomes, trailers, boats, campers) on subdivision interest or street except: loading/unloading ≤48 hours per 7-day period; visiting guests with Board written consent; or in designated RV spaces if provided. No vehicle repair/servicing visible from adjacent property. No car washing on streets or driveways. Streets must be clear during scheduled street cleaning.
properties.architectural_control: Architectural Review Committee (ARC) appointed by the Board. Approval required before any improvements: buildings, fences, walls, pools, spas, ponds, fountains, landscaping, stonework, concrete work, mechanical/plumbing/electrical, awnings, patio covers. Brush Management Zone One restrictions apply to combustible structures.
properties.amendment_threshold: 67% of voting power for standard amendments; 75% of voting power for material/Declaration amendments (Article XI, Section 2 & 3). Court-order reduction of threshold is permitted under CA Civil Code §1356.
